testsuite.name: test
testsuite.system-err: SLF4J: No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. апр. 17, 2026 12:24:33 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 апр. 17, 2026 12:24:33 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.101. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.14.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
